name: Sling Chair Caramel - Room Essentials™
description:
Lean back and sink in after a long day with this Upholstered Sling Chair from Room Essentials™. Supported by a steel frame, this sling chair features a padded seat and back for plenty of support while you read or watch TV, while the faux-leather upholstery gives it a luxurious feel. Best of all, the sling chair folds down for effortless transportation from one place to another.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Height from the base to top of the chair: 32.87”
Depth from front stand to back stand: 26.38”
Height from floor to bottom of seat: 16.34”
Width of seat: 18.5”
Width from each arm rest: 25.98”
Depth of seat: 16.34”
